content_body: Our family is leaving today after a 5-day stay.  How fantastic.  This trip was planned basically for my mother-in-law.  You see, this will be her last Thanksgiving.  We wanted her to spend it in a beautiful setting and she did.  She had the opportunity to see gorgeous sunrises and sunsets.  She got to laugh and cry with her family and to say a sweet, formal farewell to us all.  Don't feel badly for our family.  This trip was full of fun and laughter.  Sweet, sweet memories as well.  We are loaded with pictures of Mom, Grandma, and Great-Grandma.  This cabin shall forever be a part of our family and yes, we will return.
title: A Sweet Farewell Trip at Serendipity
